# NoSky

> NoSky is a cloud backup and ransomware recovery platform for small and mid-sized businesses. Automated, encrypted, immutable backups with 15-minute recovery.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://nosky.io/): Overview of NoSky cloud backup and ransomware recovery platform
- [Cloud Backup](https://nosky.io/product/cloud-backup): Automated cloud backup for servers, endpoints, SaaS apps, and VMs
- [Disaster Recovery](https://nosky.io/product/disaster-recovery): Full VM spin-up in under 15 minutes from any recovery point
- [Ransomware Protection](https://nosky.io/product/ransomware-protection): Immutable, air-gapped backups that ransomware cannot touch
- [Microsoft 365 Backup](https://nosky.io/product/microsoft-365-backup): Complete backup for Exchange, OneDrive, SharePoint, Teams
- [Endpoint Backup](https://nosky.io/product/endpoint-backup): Protect every laptop and workstation
- [Pricing](https://nosky.io/pricing): Flexible plans for small business to enterprise
- [Security](https://nosky.io/security): AES-256 encryption, ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA, DPDP Act
- [About](https://nosky.io/about): Our mission to make SMB backup bulletproof
- [Contact](https://nosky.io/contact): Sales, support, and partnerships
- [Blog](https://nosky.io/blog): Guides on backup, ransomware defense, and business continuity

## Product Details

- **Company**: NoSky by Elcom Digital Solutions
- **Founded**: 2023
- **Headquarters**: Ghaziabad, India
- **Founder**: Himanshu Kumar
- **Category**: Cloud Backup & Disaster Recovery SaaS
- **Target Market**: Small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs)
- **Key Differentiators**: Immutable backup by default, 15-minute recovery, India data residency, DPDP Act compliance
- **Encryption**: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit
- **Certifications**: ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, HIPAA, DPDP Act, PCI-DSS
- **Data Centers**: Mumbai, Singapore, Frankfurt, Virginia
